mapper.insert:
insert into orders
number, status, user_id, order_time, checkout_time, pay_method, pay_status, amount, remark, user_name, cancel_reason, rejection_reason, cancel_time, tableware_number, tableware_status,
#{number}, #{status}, #{userId}, #{orderTime}, #{checkoutTime}, #{payMethod}, #{payStatus}, #{amount}, #{remark}, #{userName}, #{cancelReason}, #{rejectionReason}, #{cancelTime}, #{tablewareNumber}, #{tablewareStatus},
